'''Sendarl Electronics''' was a company based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]] that specialized in the manufacture of electronic equipment. They were contracted by the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] to manufacture [[Sensor/Legends|sensory arrays]] for [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droids]].<ref name="GNN6" />

The company was incredibly successful in the [[Darpa sector/Legends|Darpa sector]], reaching the height of its success under the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. Sendarl's workers were primarily nonhuman, relying on [[Droid/Legends|droid]] workers to supplement the organic workers.

Unfortunately for Sendarl, the anti-alien bias of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was revealed to the Darpa sector due to the efforts of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] terrorist group known as the [[Faceless]]. Due to this revelation, the decidedly alien workforce went on strike, leaving Sendarl's many manufacturing plants completely inoperative. A few plants were able to continue processing on droid labor, but the strike severely crippled Sedarl's value and profits. Luckily for the company, the strike was put to an end thanks to the efforts of [[Kanno Sebak]].
